description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden wardrobe with a dark brown finish, featuring two vertically aligned doors on the upper section and two spacious drawers below. The doors are equipped with round, dark knobs for easy opening, and the drawers have matching handles. The surface of the wardrobe displays a subtle wood grain texture, giving it a natural and classic appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no additional features or decorations. The wardrobe is likely hollow inside, designed to store clothing or other personal items, and its sturdy construction suggests it can support moderate weight on top. Its overall design is functional and suitable for placement in urban environments such as apartments, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden wardrobe with two doors and two drawers, featuring round handles and a subtle wood grain texture. Its design is simple, functional, and classic.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with round handles and two drawers below, each with a matching knob.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with visible wood grain and no handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wooden back panel with a faint vertical seam.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, with a plain wooden surface and no visible features.
